TITLE: OAuth Token Expired
DESCRIPTION: The receiver system rejected the request because the OAuth access token is expired or invalid.
STEPS: [{"step":1,"action":"Open SAP Integration Suite Monitor and identify the failed message processing log."},{"step":2,"action":"Verify the OAuth credential configured in Security Material."},{"step":3,"action":"Generate or refresh the OAuth access token from the provider system."},{"step":4,"action":"Update the credential artifact and redeploy the iFlow."},{"step":5,"action":"Reprocess the failed message and validate successful execution."}]

TITLE: XSLT Mapping Null Reference Exception
DESCRIPTION: The integration flow failed because the XSLT mapping attempted to access an XML node or value that was missing or null.
STEPS: [{"step":1,"action":"Open the failed MPL log and identify the XSLT mapping step."},{"step":2,"action":"Download the source payload from attachments for validation."},{"step":3,"action":"Check the XSLT script for missing node handling or unsafe XPath expressions."},{"step":4,"action":"Add null checks or conditional validations in the XSLT mapping."},{"step":5,"action":"Redeploy the iFlow and retest using the same payload."}]

TITLE: Partner Connection Timeout
DESCRIPTION: The receiver system did not respond within the configured timeout duration causing the integration process to fail.
STEPS: [{"step":1,"action":"Check whether the receiver application is available and reachable."},{"step":2,"action":"Review timeout configuration in the receiver adapter settings."},{"step":3,"action":"Verify network connectivity between SAP Integration Suite and the partner endpoint."},{"step":4,"action":"Increase timeout values if the receiver processing is expected to take longer."},{"step":5,"action":"Retry the failed message after confirming receiver availability."}]

TITLE: SFTP Connection Refused
DESCRIPTION: The SFTP server rejected the incoming connection request due to invalid connectivity or authentication settings.
STEPS: [{"step":1,"action":"Verify the SFTP host name, port number, and path configuration."},{"step":2,"action":"Check whether the SFTP server is active and accepting connections."},{"step":3,"action":"Validate SSH credentials or key-pair authentication configured in Security Material."},{"step":4,"action":"Ensure firewall or IP allowlisting rules permit SAP Integration Suite access."},{"step":5,"action":"Test the SFTP connection again and reprocess the failed message."}]

TITLE: Certificate Expiry SSL Handshake Failure
DESCRIPTION: Secure SSL communication failed because the receiver or client certificate has expired or is no longer trusted.
STEPS: [{"step":1,"action":"Open Keystore Monitor and identify the expired certificate."},{"step":2,"action":"Request a renewed certificate from the certificate authority or partner."},{"step":3,"action":"Upload the updated certificate into SAP Integration Suite keystore."},{"step":4,"action":"Update the relevant communication channel or security artifact."},{"step":5,"action":"Redeploy the iFlow and validate SSL connectivity."}]

TITLE: Database Connectivity Failure
DESCRIPTION: The integration flow failed because the target database connection could not be established.
STEPS: [{"step":1,"action":"Verify the JDBC endpoint URL and database host availability."},{"step":2,"action":"Check the database credentials configured in Security Material."},{"step":3,"action":"Ensure the database firewall allows incoming traffic from SAP Integration Suite."},{"step":4,"action":"Validate database certificate and SSL configuration if enabled."},{"step":5,"action":"Retry the integration scenario after restoring connectivity."}]

TITLE: OData Service Unavailable
DESCRIPTION: The target OData API endpoint is unavailable or returned a service downtime response.
STEPS: [{"step":1,"action":"Check whether the OData service endpoint is accessible in browser or API client."},{"step":2,"action":"Verify SAP backend system health and active service status."},{"step":3,"action":"Review authentication and authorization configuration for the OData service."},{"step":4,"action":"Inspect SAP Gateway logs for backend processing errors."},{"step":5,"action":"Retry the request after the service becomes available."}]

TITLE: Payload Validation Failed
DESCRIPTION: The incoming message payload does not match the expected schema or mandatory field structure.
STEPS: [{"step":1,"action":"Download the failed payload from MPL attachments."},{"step":2,"action":"Compare the payload structure with the expected schema definition."},{"step":3,"action":"Identify missing mandatory fields or invalid data formats."},{"step":4,"action":"Correct the payload generation logic in the sender system."},{"step":5,"action":"Resend the corrected payload for processing."}]

TITLE: API Rate Limit Exceeded
DESCRIPTION: The target API rejected requests because the allowed transaction threshold was exceeded.
STEPS: [{"step":1,"action":"Review API provider rate limit policies and quota restrictions."},{"step":2,"action":"Check integration scheduling frequency and request burst volume."},{"step":3,"action":"Implement retry handling with exponential backoff logic."},{"step":4,"action":"Reduce concurrent requests or optimize batch processing."},{"step":5,"action":"Reprocess failed messages after the rate limit window resets."}]

TITLE: Message Mapping Failure
DESCRIPTION: The message mapping step failed due to transformation inconsistencies or invalid field mappings.
STEPS: [{"step":1,"action":"Open the message mapping artifact in the integration flow."},{"step":2,"action":"Validate source and target structure compatibility."},{"step":3,"action":"Check for missing mandatory target fields or datatype mismatches."},{"step":4,"action":"Correct mapping logic and retest with sample payloads."},{"step":5,"action":"Deploy the updated integration flow and retry processing."}]
